title: Introducing Automations: always-on coding agents
summary: Cursor introduced Automations, a feature for building always-on coding agents that run on schedules or trigger based on events like Slack messages, Linear issues, GitHub PRs, and PagerDuty incidents. The agents can be automated to respond to external system events.
